info.name: Microsoft Azure ProfessionalService
info.description: REST APIs for Marketplace Professional Service Offers

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Professionalservice Resources

query.description: (Required) The API version to be used with the HTTP request.

variable.description: (Required) The Azure subscription ID. This is a GUID-formatted string (e.g. 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000)

request.description: Gets information about all the Subscription Level ProfessionalService in a certain Azure subscription.

response.name: Request successful. The request returns the resulting ProfessionalService resources.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to be used with the HTTP request.

response.name: A response indicating an error.
